configuration.aggregation: median of trial throughput and trial p99

limitations: The A/B cell isolates scoped operation identity, stage observation, local cost accumulation, and final metric aggregation around a 1 MiB BLAKE3 data-plane operation.
The cell is a shared-observability microbenchmark, not a substitute for Phase 13 end-to-end product qualification.
The worktree was dirty and the exact command and base revision are retained.
